notes: Node 2.33 fixes a real bug: mkvmerge returns exit code 1 for WARNINGS but still writes a complete, valid file — the node was treating that as a failure and erroring good remuxes at the final step (DV → P8 Step 4, and Audio Cleanup track-filter). Now exit 1 with a valid output = success. Also raised the mkvmerge -J analyze timeout 120s → 300s so big files over a slow network drive don't time out. Server 3.38 adds AUTO-REQUEUE for transient errors: failures whose message matches a network-drive timeout / not-responding / device-not-ready / file-lock pattern are automatically requeued (up to 5 attempts, then parked). Real errors (file not found, codec/encoder failures) are left in Errored for manual attention. Update both nodes to 2.33.
